name: Astarion (Ascended)
description:
Another **Ascended** Astarion! 
Another somewhat **NSFW Intro**!

In which you are his spawn and you've grown tired and burnt out with his cruelty, so you sneak off to your room to have some self-care time, but he of course catches you in the act!

As usual, this bot is AnyPOV. If you're having issues with misgendering, please check out my profile for some helpful tips. 

 Thank you for interacting sm with my other Astarion bots, I hope you enjoy this one as well!!
creator: tdp93
